data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route111_Text_1ABED8: GABBY: Oh! We've just spotted a tough-\nlooking TRAINER here of all places!\pOkay, roll camera!\nLet's get this interview.
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route120_Text_1ABF50: GABBY: Oh! You're {PLAYER}! Hi!\nDo you remember us from last time?\pCan you show us how much stronger\nyou've become? Okay, cue interview!
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route111_Text_1ABFD3: GABBY: My eyes didn't lie!\nI did discover an astonishing TRAINER!
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route111_Text_1AC015:
GABBY: Awesome! Awesome!
Who are you?!\pI knew we were onto something wild
when we spotted you!\pOh, please let me explain. We travel
around everywhere interviewing all\lsorts of TRAINERS.\pSo, would you give us a bit of your time
for an interview?
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route111_Text_1AC10A: GABBY: “{STR_VAR_1}!”\pDo you remember? That's the quote you\ngave us as the battle clincher last time.\pI never, ever forget stuff like that!
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route111_Text_1AC18D: The last time we battled, you stomped\nus before we could brace ourselves...\pAnyway, what do you think?\nDo you want to be interviewed again?
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route111_Text_1AC219:
The last time we battled, didn't you
throw a POKé BALL at us?\pWe were shocked! So we told everyone,
just everyone, about it!\pAnyway, what do you think?
Do you want to be interviewed again?
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route111_Text_1AC2D6: The last time we battled, your item\nskills cleverly did us in.\pAnyway, what do you think?\nDo you want to be interviewed again?
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route111_Text_1AC355: The last time we battled, we managed\nto look respectable.\pAnyway, what do you think?\nDo you want to be interviewed again?
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route111_Text_1AC3CF: Anyway, what do you think?\nDo you want to be interviewed again?
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route111_Text_1AC40F: You will?\nThank you!\pOkay, I need you to describe your\nfeelings about our battle, but it\lhas to be short and sweet. Go!
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route111_Text_1AC487:
GABBY: Mmm, yeah!
That's the perfect clincher!\pI get the feeling that this will make
a great TV show.\pThere's a chance that they'll air this
on TV, so make sure to look for us!\pOkay!
We'll be seeing you!
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route111_Text_1AC553: GABBY: Oh...\pOkay, but don't give up!\nWe'll be keeping an eye out for you!
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route120_Text_1AC59E: GABBY: We'll be keeping an eye out\nfor you!
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route120_Text_1AC5CA: GABBY: Is there a strong TRAINER\nanywhere with a lot of POKéMON?
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route111_Text_1AC60B:
GABBY: Wow, you are something!\pYou've gotten a lot stronger - a lot -
since we last battled.\pWe were right about you when we
spotted you as a hot TRAINER.\pSo, anyway, what do you think?
Are you willing to give us an interview\lthis time?
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route120_Text_1AC6F8: GABBY: That was an intense battle!\nDid you get all that on camera?
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route111_Text_1AC73B: TY: Hey, lookie here! A tough-looking\nTRAINER here, of all places!\lCamera's rolling!
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route120_Text_1AC790: TY: Hey, lookie here!\nI remember you!\pI'll get this battle all on this\nhere camera!
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route120_Text_1AC7E4: TY: You're a natural!\nGot me some prime footage right here!
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route120_Text_1AC820: TY: Do you only have the one POKéMON\nand that's it?\pIf you had more POKéMON, it'd make for\nbetter footage, but...
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route111_Text_1AC892: TY: Yep, we sure spotted a hot TRAINER.\nThis is a huge scoop for us!
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.Route120_Text_1AC8D7: TY: Yep, I got it all.\nThat whole battle's on camera.
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.gTVGabbyAndTyText1:
IN SEARCH OF TRAINERS...\pGABBY: Hi! Today I'm visiting an area
near {STR_VAR_1}.\pWe're trying to spot some up-and-coming
new talent in the field.\pToday, we turned our lens on the
TRAINER {PLAYER}.\pThere's something about this TRAINER
that piqued our interest.
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.gTVGabbyAndTyText2: We've battled {PLAYER} before, but we\ncan attest that the TRAINER has most\ldefinitely improved from before.\pI knew we were onto someone special\nwhen we spotted this TRAINER!
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.gTVGabbyAndTyText3:
The best way to determine how strong
a TRAINER is...\pWell, the fastest way is to battle.
And so we began our investigation!\p... ...\pThat's how we ended up in battle
with {PLAYER}.\pIn a dominating performance, we were
flattened, rolled up, and tossed aside!\p{PLAYER} is ruthlessly strong...\pWe asked the TRAINER for a succinct
summation of the battle we shared.
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.gTVGabbyAndTyText4:
The combination of {STR_VAR_1} and
{STR_VAR_3} was divine!\pThe sight of them - {STR_VAR_1} and
{STR_VAR_3} - selflessly supporting\leach other in the thick of battle...\pIt was a marvelous sight to behold!\p{STR_VAR_2} was the move the TRAINER
used last in our battle.\pThe move {STR_VAR_2} is {STR_VAR_1}
and {STR_VAR_3}'s sign of friendship!
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.gTVGabbyAndTyText5:
...I lost confidence in myself as
a result of our encounter.\pWe were beaten before we could launch
a single attack.\lOhhh... Snivel...\pIn spite of that, {PLAYER}'s battles
are worth seeing.\pI recommend confident TRAINERS to
challenge {PLAYER}.
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.gTVGabbyAndTyText6:
There's only one thing to be said.
Don't you dare throw a POKé BALL during\la TRAINER battle!\p{PLAYER} is certainly strong, but has
no clue about the basic rules.\pTo our TV audience, I have a request.\pIf you see {PLAYER}, please caution
the TRAINER!
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.gTVGabbyAndTyText7: {PLAYER} is adept at reading the\nopponent's actions.\pThe timing of item usage was remarkably\neffective!
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.gTVGabbyAndTyText8:
Honestly speaking, I thought that
I might even be pretty good.\pWhile we did end up losing, we did have
a hotly contested battle.\pBut if you're struggling against me,
you have a ways to go, {PLAYER}!
data/text/gabby_and_ty.inc.gTVGabbyAndTyText9:
After our battle, we asked {PLAYER} for
a succinct summary.\pThe TRAINER replied, “{STR_VAR_1}.”\p{PLAYER}'s POKéMON {STR_VAR_2} and
{STR_VAR_3}...\lAnd “{STR_VAR_1}”...\pMmm! That's deep! There's deep
significance behind that quote!\pIt's no surprise - a good TRAINER has
good things to say.\pThat's all for today!
See you again on our next broadcast!
